key.name: filter-junk
key.description: Whether SamRewritten should filter junk items.

key.name: app-theme
key.description: The preferred color scheme for the application. Valid values are 'system', 'light', and 'dark'.

key.name: app-sort
key.description: How the app list is sorted. Valid values are 'app_id', 'alphabetical', 'last_played', and 'playtime'.

key.name: disable-animations
key.description: Whether to disable card hover animations in the app list.

key.name: unlock-mode
key.description: How the achievement view commits toggles. Valid values are 'autocommit' (each switch commits immediately) and 'deferred' (toggles build an ordered queue that the user fires later).

key.name: auto-fill-unit
key.description: Which unit the Auto-fill target is expressed in. Valid values are 'count' (number of achievements) and 'percent' (target completion percentage).

key.name: auto-fill-count
key.description: Last value used for the count-based auto-fill target.

key.name: auto-fill-percent
key.description: Last value used for the percent-based auto-fill target (0 to 100).

key.name: unlock-duration-minutes
key.description: Total time window over which deferred unlocks are spread.

key.name: unlock-spacing
key.description: How deferred unlocks are spread over the duration. Valid values are 'even' (equally spaced) and 'random' (first and last pinned to even positions, middle jittered).
